channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI accelerates the hunt for room temperature superconductors
item.description: Scientists combined machine learning with quantum physics to discover two new superconductors and create a faster way to search for many more...

item.title: Engineers solve airflow mystery nearly a mile underground
item.description: Engineers at a deep underground research facility noticed something strange during major rainstorms: airflow underground sometimes reversed direction...

item.title: Astronomers observe the birth of a magnetar for the first time
item.description: A strange chirping signal from a distant supernova has revealed the birth of a magnetar, confirming that these highly magnetic neutron stars can...

item.title: Scientists solve a 30-year rye pollen mystery that could transform cancer research
item.description: Scientists have finally solved a nearly 30-year-old mystery about two unusual molecules in rye pollen that once showed an intriguing abili...
